_comment: Copy to devices.json (repo root, gitignored). First device is the default active profile unless INTIFACE_ACTIVE_DEVICE is set in .env.

_format.match_strings: Substrings tried in order against the Intiface device name (case-insensitive)
_format.capabilities: Optional map describing vibrate / rotate / etc. on this hardware
_format.intensity_floor: Minimum intensity that usually feels clear (0.0 if unknown)

capabilities.vibrate: Lovense Tenera — vibration as exposed by Buttplug/Intiface for this model.

devices.notes: Adjust match_strings to match list_devices exactly if needed.

capabilities.vibrate: Lovense Nora: shaft + external arm vibration.
capabilities.rotate: Internal rotating / G-spot pressure where supported.

devices.notes: Intiface name is usually like “Lovense Nora”.
